content: {"file":"@angular/platform-browser/fesm2022/platform-browser.mjs","summary":"This file contains Angular's platform browser module, which includes classes and functions for managing the browser environment such as DOM manipulation, event handling, debugging tools, and hydration features. It also provides services like DomSanitizer for security purposes.","rules":[{"name":"EventManagerPluginSupport","description":"Provides support for plugins that manage events in a browser environment.","conditions":["class extends EventManagerPlugin"],"actions":["manages event listeners on HTML elements"]},{"name":"HydrationFeatureConfiguration","description":"Enables configuration of hydration features such as HTTP transfer cache options and disabling the HTTP transfer cache.","conditions":["function provideClientHydration()"],"actions":["configures hydration features for client-side applications"]}],"dependencies":["@angular/core","hammerjs","rxjs","zone.js"]}
